TTS plugin test script (English)

Paragraph one. Place the cursor anywhere in this sentence, then press leader-vo. Playback should start from this sentence.

Paragraph two. Use plus to speed up and minus to slow down. Volume can be changed with the up and down arrow keys, or the mouse wheel.

Paragraph three. Left and right arrows jump to the previous or next segment. Space pauses or resumes. Press v to open the voice list.

Paragraph four. Closing the bottom control window should stop speech immediately and clear the yellow highlight on the source text.

Paragraph five. If you start from a sentence in the middle, reading should continue to the end. Move the cursor to another sentence during playback and press the play shortcut again to jump to that segment.

Extra lines for long-run highlight sync. The early bird catches the worm. Practice makes perfect. Better late than never. Actions speak louder than words. Where there is a will, there is a way. All that glitters is not gold.

Note. After you pick an English voice in the float, the preference is remembered for next time. Audio should use the current Windows default playback device.

Final paragraph. End of test. Press q or leader-vs to stop.
